title: Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) Anti-Racism Strategy 2.0 (2021-2024) - Canada.ca
content:
## Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC) Anti-Racism Strategy 2.0 (2021-2024)

## Energy, Conviction and Courage
“We can’t combat white supremacy unless we can teach people to love justice. You have to love justice more than your allegiance to your race, sexuality and gender. It is about justice.” - bell hooks (1952-2021)
